# MadamsAI
> AI Companion for Women Entrepreneurs & Career Growth — dual-engine verified

## What is MadamsAI?
MadamsAI is a dual-engine AI companion for women entrepreneurs, founders, and career professionals. Two AI models (Grok + DeepSeek) cross-verify every response — business and career advice you can trust.

## Features
- Business launch (ideation, validation, MVP, business model, growth)
- Funding & finance (grants for women founders, pitch decks, bootstrapping, pricing)
- Leadership (team building, negotiation, executive presence, imposter syndrome)
- Career growth (personal branding, networking, career pivots, mentorship)
- Work-life integration (boundaries, energy management, sustainable pace)
- Marketing & sales (content strategy, community building, storytelling, PR)

## Architecture
- Dual-engine: Grok 4.5 (xAI) + DeepSeek
- Anti-confabulation: trigram-cosine concordance >= 0.45 required
- Stateless: queries processed in real-time, never stored

## Compliance
- EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Art. 50 — limited-risk, full transparency
- GDPR (Reg. 2016/679) — minimal data, no query storage

## Links
- Website: https://madamsai.com
- API: https://madamsai-api-production.up.railway.app
- Contact: hello@madamsai.com
